h1. Scope, MVP, and Phasing

h2. MVP Objective

Deliver a working vertical slice that supports AI-ready metadata discovery and basic lineage-aware search.

h2. MVP Entity Scope

|| Entity || MVP? || Reason ||
| Distribution | Yes | Primary physical asset |
| Dataset | Yes | Logical data asset |
| DataModelEntity | Yes | Table/view/entity-level structure |
| DataModelAttribute | Yes | Column/attribute search |
| DataService | Yes | Service exposure and access metadata |
| DataFlow | Yes | Observed lineage |
| DataProcess | Yes | Processing and transformation lineage |
| Node | Yes | Foundational relationship entity |
| Report | Yes | Downstream report dependency search |
| DataProduct | Phase 2 | Product-level grouping |
| DataDomain | Phase 2 | Domain-level grouping |
| Glossary/Semantic Entities | Phase 2 | Business meaning |
| Governance/Classification Entities | Phase 2/3 | Governance-aware search |
| Event Entities | Phase 3 | Summarized event intelligence |

h2. Phase 0 — Planning and Architecture

* Define MVP scope
* Confirm identity rules
* Confirm *jrn* strategy
* Define chunk schema
* Define graph schema
* Define access control approach
* Create golden question set

h2. Phase 1 — Metadata Foundation

* MongoDB reader
* Entity validation
* Relationship resolver
* Node resolver
* Indexing status tracking
* Change detection

h2. Phase 2 — AI Chunks and Vector Search

* Chunk templates
* Embedding service
* Vector index
* Vector upsert
* Semantic search API
* Basic answer grounding

h2. Phase 3 — Graph Projection

* Neo4j schema
* Graph loaders
* Lineage traversal queries
* Impact analysis queries

h2. Phase 4 — GraphRAG Search

* Intent classifier
* Entity resolver
* Graph expansion
* Context assembler
* Answer composer
* Citation/source references

h2. Phase 5 — Context Plane and Agents

* Acronyms
* Historical Q&A
* User bookmarks
* Feedback
* Supervisor Agent
* Structured Discovery Agent
* Metadata Enrichment Agent

h2. Phase 6 — Evaluation and Operations

* Golden question testing
* Retrieval quality evaluation
* Lineage correctness evaluation
* Access-control testing
* Reindex dashboard
* Runbooks
